bench_setup.notes: WWDG1 self-feed test. WWDG1 (APB3, 0x50003000, WWDG1EN=RCC_APB3ENR bit6). Config: WDGTB=/8 (fWWDG≈1953Hz, period≈512µs/count), T=0x7F, W=0x50 (window). Refreshes 5x at 25ms intervals (T counts 127→~78, inside window W=80). Verifies RCC_RSR.WWDG1RSTF not set (no reset occurred). On PASS: detail0=5 (successful refreshes). On FAIL: 0xE001=WWDG reset detected (missed window). No loopback wiring required.
